title: The New Order: World Collided | Timeless Traveler
description: Become a being older than the universe with this Origin
body: This mod is a add-on to the Origins mod. this was made and created by me solely, I made this for The New Order: Worlds Collided modpack and now it can be added to your own modpacks and worlds. The origin Timeless Traveler was the first origin mod that I made with this origin you become a being as old as time and through out your life you learned to harness comic energy but with it having so many upsides you are weaker having less hearts and boss mobs doing more damage
